name: The Golf Club
about: The Golf Club is a members-only, semi-private indoor golf facility providing 24-hour access to state-of-the-art golf simulators and practice areas. The venue is equipped with aboutGOLF simulators featuring 3D virtual courses and a custom-built chipping and putting area. It offers various membership tiers, including per-hour usage, free play, and weekday options, with non-members able to book by appointment. The facility emphasizes advanced swing analysis with high-speed cameras and provides a comfortable environment for both casual play and serious practice.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 member access to simulators and practice areas
Advanced swing analysis with high-speed cameras and detailed metrics
Flexible membership options including per-hour and no-fee play
Ability to bring guests for a small fee
State-of-the-art aboutGOLF simulators for realistic gameplay

food_and_drink.notes: No food or drink service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-level simulators used by PGA professionals

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but as a golf simulator facility, it is assumed you need to bring your own clubs or can rent them if available.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned; BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is likely allowed but not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Two players can play 9 holes in an hour or 18 holes in 2 hours on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility welcomes everyone, but the primary focus is on golf. There are no specific kid-friendly amenities mentioned, but it is not explicitly restricted.
